fields.name: IRAP PoC Control Subset
fields.description: Week 6 seed data: representative subset of IRAP controls for prototype evaluation.

fields.name: Production Environment
fields.description: Primary system boundary for production workloads.

fields.name: CI/CD Pipeline
fields.description: Build and deployment pipeline boundary (GitHub Actions / CI runners / artifact storage).

fields.name: Access Control Policy
fields.description: Organization policy describing access control objectives and requirements.

fields.name: Joiner-Mover-Leaver Procedure
fields.description: Procedure for onboarding, role changes and offboarding (account lifecycle).

fields.name: Cloud Architecture Diagram
fields.description: High-level architecture diagram showing core components and trust boundaries.

fields.name: Centralized Logging Configuration
fields.description: Logging/monitoring configuration demonstrating collection and retention.

fields.name: Change Ticket Sample (Deploy #42)
fields.description: Example change record demonstrating review/approval and deployment traceability.

fields.name: Security Attestation Notes
fields.description: Interview/attestation notes confirming operational practices.
Policy page in Confluence (placeholder).
JML procedure doc (placeholder).
Architecture diagram stored in object storage (placeholder).
Dashboard showing logging signals (placeholder).
Example change ticket (placeholder).
Local notes reference for PoC demo (placeholder).

fields.notes: Applies to prod IAM and RBAC policies.
User lifecycle operations scoped to production accounts.
Diagram covers production boundary and dependencies.
Central logging for prod services and audit logs.
Change management evidence scoped to CI/CD.

fields.name: Access Control Policy and Procedures
fields.description: Establish and maintain access control policy and procedures.

fields.name: Account Management
fields.description: Manage information system accounts including creation, modification, disabling and removal.

fields.name: Access Enforcement
fields.description: Enforce approved authorizations for logical access.

fields.name: Event Logging
fields.description: Determine and log auditable events for accountability and monitoring.

fields.name: Audit Review and Analysis
fields.description: Review and analyze audit logs for indications of inappropriate or unusual activity.

fields.name: Baseline Configuration
fields.description: Develop, document, and maintain baseline configurations for the system.

fields.name: Configuration Change Control
fields.description: Manage configuration changes through approval and documentation.

fields.name: User Identification and Authentication
fields.description: Uniquely identify and authenticate users.

fields.name: System Security Plan
fields.description: Develop and maintain a system security plan covering scope and controls.

fields.name: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning
fields.description: Monitor and scan for vulnerabilities and remediate identified issues.

fields.name: Boundary Protection
fields.description: Monitor, control and protect communications at external boundaries.

fields.name: System Monitoring
fields.description: Monitor the system for attacks and indicators of compromise.

fields.notes: Policy evidence reused across multiple controls.
